description: A threat intelligence feed identifies an IP address that is attempting to brute-force user accounts.

nodes.task_description: Receive the malicious IP address from the threat feed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the IP to be blocked.

nodes.task_description: Add the IP address to the firewall's blocklist.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully applies a firewall rule to block the IP.

nodes.task_description: Verify in the logs that traffic from the blocked IP is no longer reaching the application.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the block is effective.
